name: Jellyfish
description: Bioluminescent pulse network intelligence — 600 million years of evolution without a brain, heart, or blood. Distributed nerve net coordinates rhythmic bell contractions for jet propulsion. Turritopsis dohrnii achieves biological immortality through transdifferentiation, reverting adult cells to juvenile polyp state. Bioluminescent communication creates light-pulse languages in the deep ocean. The oldest surviving animal nervous system architecture.

core_attributes.neurology: diffuse nerve net, no central brain, rhopalia sensory clusters
core_attributes.pattern: bioluminescent pulse signaling, biological immortality, jet propulsion rhythm
